title: Astolfo Mod
description: The Astolfo mod adds a bunch of femboys, trans girls and enbys into Minecraft.

# Astolfo Forge Mod

**What does it add?**

## Mobs

A wide selection of mobs is added by this mod:

- **Astolfo in 3 outfits** - Astolfo Schoolgirl, Astolfo Armour and Astolfo in Casual outfit
- **Felix Argyle**
- **Hideri Kanzaki**
- **Venti**
- **Rimuru**
- **Nagisa Shiota**
- **Sieg** (Fate/Apocrypha)
- **Bridget** _(I know she's a transgender girl but I included her because why not)_

## Commands

A selection of commands is available to mess with the mobs that are added in the mod:

- `/duplicatecuties <amount> <range>` - Duplicate all of the added mobs within the range amount times. The mod doesn't have any limits in the 2 parameters, so entering big numbers might cause your game to crash!
- `/despawn <selector>` - This command is simple and allows you to "kill" monsters without the animation. This prevents the particles from death spawning and lagging your game if you have too many mobs from this mod spawned.
- `/cuterain <iterations> <range> <height>` - This command makes the mobs above rain from the sky. It runs how many times interations is, spawning mobs in the range provided, spawning them in the specified height. Every iteration spawns 1 of each mob above, excluding creative mobs.

## Creative items and mobs

- **Astolfo Attractor** - The text "gay" in the menu, attracts only variants of Astolfo.
- **Astolfo Repellent** - A Felix Argyle entity which repells all Astolfos from it's location.
- **Monster White** - No crafting recipe yet, gives you speed and jump boost and gives you trans rights 🏳️‍⚧️❤️

# Video about the mod

I've also made a video about the mod on my YouTube channel, so if you want to watch that, you can do so:

# I need help!

Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/aE2MXH5Qp6) for help!

# Supporting this mod

## 1. Suggestions

The simplest you can do for now is to **create an idea suggestion** for the mod using an [issue](https://git.lunya.pet/lunya/AstolfoForge/issues). 

## 2. Reporting bugs

If you find any bug in the mod, **you can report it** using [an issue](https://git.lunya.pet/lunya/AstolfoForge/issues) for it to be fixed. It will be fixed once I get some free time.

## 3. Donations

**You can currently support me on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/lunyauwu) right now.**

[Project Website](https://lunya.nekoweb.org/project/astolfomod), [source code](https://git.lunya.pet/lunya/AstolfoForge), [More from the author](https://lunya.pet/)
